seoTitle: Old Junee vs Old Mill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Old Junee and Old Mill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Old Junee vs Old Mill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Junee and Old Mill.
heading: Old Junee vs Old Mill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Junee, New South Wales and Old Mill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Junee has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Old Mill (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Junee or Old Mill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Junee has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Old Mill scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Junee scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Old Mill scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Junee or Old Mill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Junee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
